title: Clean Wool
description: A texture pack that makes wool, carpet, and concrete look nicer with clean and connected textures.
body:
Clean Wool is a texture pack that adds crisp outlines to wool and carpet (along with concrete from version 1.4 and up!) across *almost all* major Minecraft versions! These subtle outlines give blocks a cleaner, more refined look.

It also uses the [OptiFine CTM format](https://optifine.readthedocs.io/ctm.html) to connect outlines seamlessly, making the textures look even smoother and more cohesive. Originally designed for minigames like BedWars or technical builds like Redstone contraptions, it’s also perfect if you just want your world to look sharper in vanilla or any other context.

![A render of all wool colors displaying the use of the texture pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bcVGUvnQ/images/0de04159c3d1498a1988b8d135360507ce361381.png)

### Notes

* Connected textures require [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), or another mod adds support for the [OptiFine CTM format](https://optifine.readthedocs.io/ctm.html).
* Screenshots use the [Complementary Reimagined shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) with [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches).
